mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `product` WHERE category IN ( WITH RECURSIVE `category_cte` AS ( SELECT * FROM `category` WHERE no = #{category} UNION ALL SELECT CHILD.* FROM category_cte PARENT INNER JOIN category CHILD ON PARENT.no = CHILD.parent_no ) SELECT no FROM `category_cte` WHERE parent_no IS NOT NULL )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT no AS p_no, name, price, rating FROM `product` WHERE category IN ( WITH RECURSIVE `category_cte` AS ( SELECT * FROM `category` WHERE no = #{category} UNION ALL SELECT CHILD.* FROM category_cte PARENT INNER JOIN category CHILD ON PARENT.no = CHILD.parent_no ) SELECT no FROM `category_cte` WHERE parent_no IS NOT NULL) LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset} ) AS CP INNER JOIN ( SELECT no AS pi_no, product_no, original_filename FROM product_image WHERE no IN ( SELECT min(no) FROM product_image GROUP BY product_no )) PI ON CP.p_no = PI.product_no

SELECT P.*, P.no p_no, P.name p_name, P.price p_price, C.no c_no, C.name c_name, PI.no pi_no, PI.original_filename, PO.no po_no, PO.name po_name, PO.price po_price FROM product P INNER JOIN category C ON C.no = P.category INNER JOIN product_image PI ON P.no = PI.product_no LEFT OUTER JOIN product_option PO ON P.no = PO.product_no WHERE P.no = #{no}
